stemHtml: The crew of a large jet aircraft want to use their Airborne Weather Radar to judge the maximum height of a thunderstorm. Their radar display is showing red in the region of the thunderstorm. In order to find the upper level of the thunderstorm, the crew increase the tilt angle of the radar. A calculation of the top of the storm can be made using the distance to the thunderstorm and the tilt angle when the display first...

options.a: shows green or yellow in the area of the storm.
options.b: becomes clear in the area of the storm.
options.c: shows magenta in the area of the storm.
options.d: shows hooks and scalloping in the area of the storm.
